meta.auditName: Q2 Branch Compliance Audit - South Region

previousAuditComparison.description: Comparison of current vs previous audit for common checkpoints, highlighting rectification effectiveness and recurring control failures.

auditorObservationTracking.description: Auditor observations and recommendations across current and previous audit schedules, supporting continuity tracking.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleObservation: Identified minor procedural gaps in data handling. System logs show inconsistencies.
auditorObservationTracking.currentScheduleRecommendation: Implement automated data validation checks and regular log reviews.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleObservation: Previous audit noted some data entry errors. Manual process was error-prone.
auditorObservationTracking.previousScheduleRecommendation: Recommended training for data entry staff and process standardization.

auditCompletionSummary.description: Final audit execution outcome covering coverage %, compliance score, issue density, and schedule adherence at both audit start and end.
